ab: Iha’an 2022 qamisan, mun’anpuk ca sasbinaz palaqanciap is itu Bununcuku’i’ a cibunsiu’ tu maqtu’ hazun palasbununun papatas is ngaan.
ch: 在2022年，政府召開了原住民身分證可單列族名的會議。
en: In 2022, the government announced that indigenous identification cards can include tribal names separately.

ab: Maicingavak is mintalminduu ka bunun inita acang Nasing Balincinan, punpipiin pundaza’ is paitasan na asa dau hazun palasbununun papatas ca ngaan ha’an cibunsiu’.
ch: 我訪問了長期向政府爭取身分證「單列族名」的部落青年人Nasing Balincinan。
en: I interviewed Nasing Balincinan, a young tribal member who has long been advocating for the inclusion of tribal names on identification cards.

ab: Patataqun azak icia tu na munha’an lumaq cia tantungu maca ha’an inul’uan dii.
ch: 我和他約定好這個假日到他家訪問他。
en: We had arranged to visit his home this holiday for the interview.

ab: Ha’an sinpacingav dii ha, papacqal zakun a cia tu mina’ica ca ngaan icia dii, madas amin zakun papacqal is kitlumaq icia, acang icia.
ch: 在訪問的過程中，他向我介紹了他的名字的由來，也帶我認識了他的家人、他的部落。
en: During the interview, he introduced to me the origin of his name and also introduced me to his family and tribe.

ab: Pacingavun zaku tu mazang siqucal tuza’ pahuvaiv is ngaan, nii’ tu macial ca maupa qabas a’ papatas?
ch: 我問他為什麼堅持要改名，舊的登記方式不好嗎?
en: I asked him why he insisted on changing his name. Wasn’t the old registration method sufficient?

ab: Tupa ka cia zakun tu, maupa’i maca malastauluu papatas a, nii’ tu mamantu ca sinpatungaan a qaquang cia, mintun amin ca duma’ bunun luklac cia tu “那先生”, Daqat mupiin paqainanan salas duma’.
ch: 他對我說，因為用中文字並不能準確的傳達他的名字，其他人還會叫他「那先生」，也因此鬧出不少笑話。
en: He told me that using Chinese characters could not accurately convey his name, and others would still call him \"Na Xian Sheng,\" which resulted in many jokes being made.

ab: Tupa kat Nasing tu, “ciat malasbunun papatas is ngaan ca nanu’ ngaan inita’, maca ngaan inita’ i’ a nanu’ sinpasnava’ is siduq nita’, kitlumaq inita’, ainakan nita’ ti cima, min’asaz tu katnuang minmadia’ ca Bununi’ mucuqais kilim is inak’anak a ngaan.”
ch: Nasing說：「原住民語書寫的名字才是我們真正的名字。我的名字代表了我們的族群、我們的家族、我們的身分，希望能有更多族人找回自己的名字。」
en: Nasing said, \"The names written in indigenous languages are our true names. My name represents our ethnic group, our family, our identity. I hope more fellow tribespeople can reclaim their own names.\"
